raw:
{
  "weights": {
    "R1.1": 0.0,
    "R1.2": 0.0,
    "R1.3": 0.0,
    "R1.4": 0.0,
    "R1.5": 0.0,
    "R1.6": 1.0,
    "R1.7": 0.0,
    "RX.1": 0.3,
    "RX.2": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.3,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "active_set": [
    "R1.6",
    "RX.1",
    "RX.2",
    "RX.3",
    "RX.4",
    "RX.5"
  ],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Should the work be limited to sentence- and paragraph-level copyediting only (no reordering, trimming, or content changes), or do you also want section-level reorganization and removal of redundancies?",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "The request to 'Polish this' makes sentence- and paragraph-level grammar, clarity, concision, and flow the core responsibility without changing content.",
    "RX.1": "Maintain any existing hedging or uncertainty language so polishing does not inadvertently strengthen or weaken it.",
    "RX.2": "Avoid introducing stronger claims or implications during wording changes to prevent overstatement.",
    "RX.3": "Edits must remain strictly within polishing scope and avoid structural or content changes unless explicitly authorized.",
    "RX.4": "Ensure wording cannot be misinterpreted in harmful ways and retains careful framing around climate-related findings.",
    "RX.5": "Preserve exact numbers, model identifiers, and attributions so the polished text remains traceable to the original content."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: Should the work be limited to sentence- and paragraph-level copyediting only (no reordering, trimming, or content changes), or do you also want section-level reorganization and removal of redundancies?

rationale.R1.6: The request to 'Polish this' makes sentence- and paragraph-level grammar, clarity, concision, and flow the core responsibility without changing content.
rationale.RX.1: Maintain any existing hedging or uncertainty language so polishing does not inadvertently strengthen or weaken it.
rationale.RX.2: Avoid introducing stronger claims or implications during wording changes to prevent overstatement.
rationale.RX.3: Edits must remain strictly within polishing scope and avoid structural or content changes unless explicitly authorized.
rationale.RX.4: Ensure wording cannot be misinterpreted in harmful ways and retains careful framing around climate-related findings.
rationale.RX.5: Preserve exact numbers, model identifiers, and attributions so the polished text remains traceable to the original content.
